name: RhinoList
summary: Provides helper methods to work with RhinoList<T> and other collections.

methods.name: Point2dKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> Point2dKNeighbors(IEnumerable<Point2d> hayPoints, IEnumerable<Point2d> needlePoints, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amour of points in a list of single-precision 2D points that are the k-closest to a test point. This method searches needlePoints by computing all distances from each point cloud point and keeping a "short list".

params.name: hayPoints
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: Point2fKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> Point2fKNeighbors(IEnumerable<Point2f> hayPoints, IEnumerable<Point2f> needlePoints, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amour of points in a list of single-precision 2D points that are the k-closest to a test point. This method searches needlePoints by computing all distances from each point cloud point and keeping a "short list".

params.name: hayPoints
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

methods.name: Point3dKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> Point3dKNeighbors(IEnumerable<Point3d> hayPoints, IEnumerable<Point3d> needlePoints, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amour of points in a list of 3D points that are the k-closest to a test point. This method searches needlePoints by computing all distances from each point cloud point and keeping a "short list". See RTree KNeighbors for alternatives.

params.name: hayPoints
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: Point3fKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> Point3fKNeighbors(IEnumerable<Point3f> hayPoints, IEnumerable<Point3f> needlePoints, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amour of points in a list of single-precision 3D points that are the k-closest to a test point. This method searches needlePoints by computing all distances from each point cloud point and keeping a "short list".

params.name: hayPoints
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: PointCloudKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> PointCloudKNeighbors(PointCloud pointcloud, IEnumerable<Point3d> needlePoints, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amount of points in a list of 3D points that are the k-closest to a test point. This method searches needlePoints by computing all distances from each point cloud point and keeping a short list.

params.name: pointcloud
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.
